svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(209, 250, 229), rgb(4, 39, 21)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(5, 150, 105), rgb(42, 167, 128));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 148px; height: 1px; padding-top: 38px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1E293B;

display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Inter, Roboto, system-ui, sans-serif; color: light-dark(#1E293B, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(237, 233, 254), rgb(37, 33, 51)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(124, 58, 237), rgb(197, 141, 255));
